---
name: 🔧 Hardware Issue
about: Report a hardware-related problem — wiring, PCB, component, or flashing issue.
title: "[HARDWARE] "
labels: hardware
assignees: ''
---

## Board / Module
Which hardware is affected?
- [ ] STM32F411 Black Pill
- [ ] ST-Link V2
- [ ] USB-to-TTL adapter
- [ ] Sensor module (specify): ___
- [ ] Custom PCB / wiring

## Description
Describe the hardware issue in detail.

## Wiring Configuration
How is the hardware connected? Reference the [Wiring Guide](https://mimic.aegiondynamic.com/docs/WIRING.html) if applicable.

## Symptoms
- What do the LEDs show?
- Does the MCU enumerate on USB?
- Any magic smoke? 💨

## Measurements
If you have a multimeter or logic analyzer, include:
- Voltage at key pins
- Signal captures (photos or screenshots)

## Photos
Attach photos of the physical setup, especially the wiring.

## Additional Context
Firmware version, bridge version, any recent changes.
